title: 国际关系
subtitle: International Relations, Global Diplomacy, Foreign Policy
assistant_message: Learn to discuss international relations, global diplomacy, and foreign policy challenges.

examples.chinese: 在国际关系方面，合作共赢是大趋势。
examples.translation: In the aspect of international relations, win-win cooperation is the major trend.
examples.translation_id: Dalam aspek hubungan internasional, kerja sama saling menguntungkan adalah tren utama.

examples.chinese: 外交政策既要维护国家利益，又要促进世界和平。
examples.translation: Foreign policy must both protect national interests and promote world peace.
examples.translation_id: Kebijakan luar negeri harus baik melindungi kepentingan nasional maupun mempromosikan perdamaian dunia.

grammar.point: Using 换句话说 (huàn jù huà shuō)

examples.chinese: 多边主义强调合作，换句话说，单边行动不可取。
examples.translation: Multilateralism emphasizes cooperation; in other words, unilateral action is not advisable.
examples.translation_id: Multilateralisme menekankan kerja sama; dengan kata lain, tindakan sepihak tidak dianjurkan.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Zhou Tao
dialogue.chinese: 在国际关系方面，合作共赢是大趋势。
dialogue.pinyin: Zài guójì guānxì fāngmiàn, hézuò gòngyíng shì dà qūshì.
dialogue.translation: In international relations, win-win cooperation is the major trend.
dialogue.translation_id: Dalam hubungan internasional, kerja sama saling menguntungkan adalah tren utama.

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Lin Hui
dialogue.chinese: 外交政策既要维护国家利益，又要促进世界和平。
dialogue.pinyin: Wàijiāo zhèngcè jì yào wéihù guójiā lìyì, yòu yào cùjìn shìjiè hépíng.
dialogue.translation: Foreign policy must both protect national interests and promote world peace.
dialogue.translation_id: Kebijakan luar negeri harus baik melindungi kepentingan nasional maupun mempromosikan perdamaian dunia.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Zhou Tao
dialogue.chinese: 如何处理国家间的冲突和分歧？
dialogue.pinyin: Rúhé chǔlǐ guójiā jiān de chōngtū hé fēnqí?
dialogue.translation: How to handle conflicts and disagreements between countries?
dialogue.translation_id: Bagaimana menangani konflik dan perbedaan pendapat antar negara?

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Lin Hui
dialogue.chinese: 多边主义强调合作，换句话说，单边行动不可取。通过对话化解冲突，实现共赢。
dialogue.pinyin: Duōbiān zhǔyì qiángdiào hézuò, huàn jù huà shuō, dānbiān xíngdòng bùkě qǔ. Tōngguò duìhuà huàjiě chōngtū, shíxiàn gòngyíng.
dialogue.translation: Multilateralism emphasizes cooperation; in other words, unilateral action is not advisable. Resolve conflicts through dialogue and achieve win-win outcomes.
dialogue.translation_id: Multilateralisme menekankan kerja sama; dengan kata lain, tindakan sepihak tidak dianjurkan. Selesaikan konflik melalui dialog dan capai hasil yang saling menguntungkan.

exercises.question: Complete: 多边主义强调合作，______，单边行动不可取。
